name: Italian Green Beans and Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound carrots, peeled & sliced into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or blanch green beans and carrots for 1-2 minutes, or until slightly soft. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for a few minutes.
3. Add the prepared green beans and carrots, tossing to coat the vegetables in oil.
4. Add Italian seasoning and butter. Sauté for 5-8 minutes.
5. Add salt and pepper. Serve hot or cool, covering and refrigerating to serve as a cold salad or side dish. This serves 6-8 people.
